## Summary

<!-- Brief description of what this PR does and why -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] chore: Maintenance / tooling / config
- [ ] refactor: Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] docs: Documentation only
- [ ] test: Adding or updating tests

## Changes

<!-- Bullet list of specific changes -->

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Lint passes (`ruff check src/ tests/`)
- [ ] SAST passes (`bandit -c pyproject.toml -r src/`)

## Spec Compliance

<!-- Link to the spec this implements, or N/A -->

- Spec: <!-- e.g., docs/specs/features/FEATURE_NAME.md or N/A -->

## Checklist

- [ ] No PII exposed in logs or responses
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env`, credentials)
- [ ] Code and comments in English
- [ ] Conventional commit messages used
- [ ] Branch created from `master` (or explicitly stated otherwise)
